---
title: vidigi
subtitle: Contributing to python package
image: animation.png
---

Since **June 2025**, I have contributed to the package **vidigi**, developed by **Sammi Rosser**. It can be used to create animations for DES models in Python.

GitHub: <https://github.com/hsma-tools/vidigi>

Documentation:

<iframe
  class="auto-preview"
  width="100%"
  height="800"
  src="https://hsma-tools.github.io/vidigi/vidigi_docs/"
  title="vidigi">
</iframe>
